loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/source-transfer' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Transfer readiness (Showing Transfer Readiness card structure — no transfer readiness, input, bypass, or sync permissive scores are measured by this asset's electrical meter.).
